summary.claim_boundary: No Seed Search; not natural-corpus proof; not production proof; not a compression claim.
summary.conclusion: Run these as independent design/audit briefs only; integration happens through generated artifacts and checks, not by weakening gates.

global_forbidden_actions: No Seed Search: do not start new depth-3, depth-4, or long-span sweeps
do not claim natural-corpus compression is proven
do not weaken controls or source-hash checks
do not edit generated markdown or JSON by hand
merge_policy: integrate one parallel group at a time
prefer generator changes over hand-written generated-doc edits
rerun the final evidence-regimen segment after packet or hypothesis changes
reject any lane that removes blockers without source evidence moving
conflict_policy: agents may read shared artifacts concurrently
agents should not edit the same generator in parallel
format-policy must review any proposed .tlmr metadata change
meta-research owns source-hash and completion-boundary changes

agents.mission: Audit corpus, long-span, and transform-frontier evidence while preserving controls and null-result visibility.
allowed_actions: read-only audits of generated evidence artifacts
generated-artifact maintenance through checked scripts
small deterministic tests for existing supported behavior
documentation clarifications that preserve current claim boundaries
subagent brainstorming that returns bounded hypotheses instead of running compute
control-matrix audits and transform-policy notes
pre-register narrow artifacts without running broad compute
read-only audits of null and near-miss ledgers
pre-register natural-corpus or transform manifests without running search
propose narrow reopen-trigger artifacts with explicit controls
tighten claims so planted evidence is not conflated with natural evidence
forbidden_actions: do not launch broad compute
No Seed Search: do not start new depth-3, depth-4, or long-span sweeps
do not claim natural-corpus compression is proven
do not claim production readiness
do not weaken controls or source-hash checks
do not edit generated markdown or JSON by hand
do not promote .tlmr format semantics
not a compression claim: do not reword null results as wins
does not override SEARCH_FRONTIER_GATE
do not count transform-only shortening as Lotus compression
do not merge held-out corpora into canonical matrices without a regeneration budget
do not promote .tlmr v2, transform metadata, or dictionary presets to stable format support
do not weaken random, shadow, binary, or same-size control requirements
promotion_triggers: An external rank-table manifest is complete, at least three unrelated ordinary held-out groups produce selected exact spans and full-stream negative rows after selector/version metadata, and paired shadow, same-size random, wrong-family, binary, and high-entropy controls stay non-negative.
Generated alignment/arity artifacts show repeatable exact selected spans on ordinary held-out corpora while random and binary controls stay null.
NATURAL_CORPUS_PROOF_MATRIX reports qualified natural-corpus proof with ordinary selected spans or negative delta and controls still null.
At least two ordinary structured fixture families show later-layer wins with exact recursive decode and no index requirement.
At least three ordinary whole-stream negative groups with zero comparable control wins and exact reconstruction from charged sidecar bytes.
A generated transform artifact reports exact selected seed spans on held-out ordinary corpora with transform metadata charged.
Frozen public dictionaries produce held-out ordinary wins while paired shadow and binary controls remain null.
At least three ordinary held-out negative groups, zero control negative groups, exact decode from preset/version metadata only, and improvement beyond equivalent random-trial scaling.
A generated artifact reports repeatable non-planted selected spans or negative delta while controls remain null.
stop_rules: Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps until search frontier, raw-suffix break-even, selected-span, and control gates pass. | Keep the separate artifact as the source of truth while raw prefix>=5, exact-hit, and selected-span rows remain zero.
Keep the fixture table out of .tlmr and do not run held-out replay until external accession and paired controls are ready.
Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps while the long-span bundle gate and search frontier remain closed.
Do not claim natural-corpus viability while any natural proof blocker remains.
Keep v2 experimental; do not reinterpret v1 layer_count or emit recursive v1 outputs.
Do not count residual proximity as compression unless full-stream charged records are negative and controls stay null.
Keep transform descriptors outside .tlmr v1/v2 until exact decode and promotion gates pass.
Do not add dictionary registry semantics to .tlmr until decoder-public identity and control separation are proven.
Do not add seed-table preset metadata to .tlmr until generated promotion gates pass and shadow controls stay null.
Stop at audit/pre-registration while prefix>=5, exact-hit, selected-span, or control gates remain null.
handoff_contract: findings first, with source artifacts and generated status
state whether current evidence proves, contradicts, or blocks the lane
list proposed files and exact check commands before broad edits
preserve No Seed Search, not natural-corpus proof, and not production proof boundaries
return a small diff plan if code/docs changes are recommended
Findings first, with source artifact paths and current hash status.
State whether every relevant stop rule remains active.
List changed files, if any, and explain why the write scope was safe.
If proposing compute, name the generated reopen trigger and budget gate.
Report verification commands run, or say exactly why they were not run.
Prefer the full evidence regimen when low-level generated artifacts move.
Keep the corpus-transform claim boundary explicit and avoid unsupported conclusions.

agents.mission: Maintain the search-depth and scale-performance economics without starting gated depth sweeps.
allowed_actions: read-only audits of generated evidence artifacts
generated-artifact maintenance through checked scripts
small deterministic tests for existing supported behavior
documentation clarifications that preserve current claim boundaries
subagent brainstorming that returns bounded hypotheses instead of running compute
cost-model and gate-threshold audits without new sweeps
read-only evidence audit and generated-artifact maintenance
read-only audits of null and near-miss ledgers
pre-register natural-corpus or transform manifests without running search
propose narrow reopen-trigger artifacts with explicit controls
tighten claims so planted evidence is not conflated with natural evidence
forbidden_actions: do not launch broad compute
No Seed Search: do not start new depth-3, depth-4, or long-span sweeps
do not claim natural-corpus compression is proven
do not claim production readiness
do not weaken controls or source-hash checks
do not edit generated markdown or JSON by hand
do not promote .tlmr format semantics
not a compression claim: do not reword null results as wins
does not override SEARCH_FRONTIER_GATE
do not run full depth-4 execution
do not expand broad raw depth search without a generated reopen trigger
do not promote .tlmr v2, transform metadata, or dictionary presets to stable format support
do not weaken random, shadow, binary, or same-size control requirements
do not count transform-only shortening as Lotus compression
do not merge held-out corpora into canonical matrices without a regeneration budget
promotion_triggers: A generated scale artifact shows bounded memory growth, exact parity, and repeatable non-planted selected spans before raw-depth expansion.
Generated alignment/arity artifacts show repeatable exact selected spans on ordinary held-out corpora while random and binary controls stay null.
Candidate-lattice telemetry improves selected bytes on non-planted held-out rows without requiring recursive superposition or decoder state.
A real kernel-backed matcher passes CPU/GPU parity on promoted workloads and improves wall-clock or energy enough to change the scale gate.
At least three ordinary whole-stream negative groups with zero comparable control wins and exact reconstruction from charged sidecar bytes.
A generated artifact reports repeatable non-planted selected spans or negative delta while controls remain null.
stop_rules: Abort deeper search if frontier exact discovery remains prefix-only with no exact hits. | Stop scaling if peak working set grows faster than search-work and target-table telemetry explains, or if target-table estimates exceed the configured memory limit.
Do not widen search solely because streaming exists; reopen compute only when search-frontier gates move.
Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps while the long-span bundle gate and search frontier remain closed.
Disallow recursive superposition; recursive passes operate only on already selected layer outputs.
Do not trust GPU output or market acceleration while the GPU feature is research-only CPU semantics.
Do not count residual proximity as compression unless full-stream charged records are negative and controls stay null.
Stop at audit/pre-registration while prefix>=5, exact-hit, selected-span, or control gates remain null.

state whether current evidence proves, contradicts, or blocks the lane
list proposed files and exact check commands before broad edits
preserve No Seed Search, not natural-corpus proof, and not production proof boundaries
return a small diff plan if code/docs changes are recommended

State whether every relevant stop rule remains active.
List changed files, if any, and explain why the write scope was safe.

Prefer the full evidence regimen when low-level generated artifacts move.
Keep the compute-economics claim boundary explicit and avoid unsupported conclusions.

allowed_actions: read-only audits of generated evidence artifacts
generated-artifact maintenance through checked scripts
small deterministic tests for existing supported behavior
documentation clarifications that preserve current claim boundaries
subagent brainstorming that returns bounded hypotheses instead of running compute
wire-format review and ADR drafting without promotion
pre-register narrow artifacts without running broad compute
read-only release-readiness audits
write compatibility-checklist proposals that do not change v1 semantics
design CPU/GPU parity tests without trusting GPU output

forbidden_actions: do not launch broad compute
No Seed Search: do not start new depth-3, depth-4, or long-span sweeps
do not claim natural-corpus compression is proven
do not claim production readiness
do not weaken controls or source-hash checks
do not edit generated markdown or JSON by hand
do not promote .tlmr format semantics
not a compression claim: do not reword null results as wins

do not promote .tlmr v2, transform metadata, or dictionary presets to stable format support
do not weaken random, shadow, binary, or same-size control requirements
do not promote experimental v2 to stable
do not market GPU as production acceleration
do not hide null or blocked results behind optimistic UI language
do not claim production readiness from planted-density benchmarks
promotion_triggers: An external rank-table manifest is complete, at least three unrelated ordinary held-out groups produce selected exact spans and full-stream negative rows after selector/version metadata, and paired shadow, same-size random, wrong-family, binary, and high-entropy controls stay non-negative.
PRODUCTION_PROOF_MATRIX reports production_proven=true, with zero blocked requirements and clean release gates.
At least two ordinary structured fixture families show later-layer wins with exact recursive decode and no index requirement.
A generated transform artifact reports exact selected seed spans on held-out ordinary corpora with transform metadata charged.
Frozen public dictionaries produce held-out ordinary wins while paired shadow and binary controls remain null.
At least three ordinary held-out negative groups, zero control negative groups, exact decode from preset/version metadata only, and improvement beyond equivalent random-trial scaling.
A release-candidate artifact shows supported format guarantees, real workload wins, CPU/GPU parity where relevant, and clean release gates.
stop_rules: Reject format work if exact hits remain absent after held-out validation.
Keep the fixture table out of .tlmr and do not run held-out replay until external accession and paired controls are ready.
Do not promote v2 or acceleration to production while production proof matrix remains not_production_ready.
Keep v2 experimental; do not reinterpret v1 layer_count or emit recursive v1 outputs.
Keep transform descriptors outside .tlmr v1/v2 until exact decode and promotion gates pass.
Do not add dictionary registry semantics to .tlmr until decoder-public identity and control separation are proven.
Do not add seed-table preset metadata to .tlmr until generated promotion gates pass and shadow controls stay null.
Stop production promotion while acceleration is research-only, memory estimates remain bounded/planted, or compatibility guarantees are experimental.

work_board.promotion_trigger: A generated artifact reports repeatable non-planted selected spans or negative delta while controls remain null.
work_board.stop_rule: Stop at audit/pre-registration while prefix>=5, exact-hit, selected-span, or control gates remain null.

work_board.promotion_trigger: An external rank-table manifest is complete, at least three unrelated ordinary held-out groups produce selected exact spans and full-stream negative rows after selector/version metadata, and paired shadow, same-size random, wrong-family, binary, and high-entropy controls stay non-negative.
work_board.stop_rule: Keep the fixture table out of .tlmr and do not run held-out replay until external accession and paired controls are ready.

work_board.promotion_trigger: Generated alignment/arity artifacts show repeatable exact selected spans on ordinary held-out corpora while random and binary controls stay null.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps while the long-span bundle gate and search frontier remain closed.

work_board.promotion_trigger: NATURAL_CORPUS_PROOF_MATRIX reports qualified natural-corpus proof with ordinary selected spans or negative delta and controls still null.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not claim natural-corpus viability while any natural proof blocker remains.

work_board.promotion_trigger: At least two ordinary structured fixture families show later-layer wins with exact recursive decode and no index requirement.
work_board.stop_rule: Keep v2 experimental; do not reinterpret v1 layer_count or emit recursive v1 outputs.

work_board.promotion_trigger: At least three ordinary whole-stream negative groups with zero comparable control wins and exact reconstruction from charged sidecar bytes.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not count residual proximity as compression unless full-stream charged records are negative and controls stay null.

work_board.promotion_trigger: A generated transform artifact reports exact selected seed spans on held-out ordinary corpora with transform metadata charged.
work_board.stop_rule: Keep transform descriptors outside .tlmr v1/v2 until exact decode and promotion gates pass.

work_board.promotion_trigger: Frozen public dictionaries produce held-out ordinary wins while paired shadow and binary controls remain null.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not add dictionary registry semantics to .tlmr until decoder-public identity and control separation are proven.

work_board.promotion_trigger: At least three ordinary held-out negative groups, zero control negative groups, exact decode from preset/version metadata only, and improvement beyond equivalent random-trial scaling.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not add seed-table preset metadata to .tlmr until generated promotion gates pass and shadow controls stay null.

work_board.promotion_trigger: A generated artifact reports repeatable non-planted selected spans or negative delta while controls remain null.
work_board.stop_rule: Stop at audit/pre-registration while prefix>=5, exact-hit, selected-span, or control gates remain null.

work_board.promotion_trigger: A generated scale artifact shows bounded memory growth, exact parity, and repeatable non-planted selected spans before raw-depth expansion.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not widen search solely because streaming exists; reopen compute only when search-frontier gates move.

work_board.promotion_trigger: Generated alignment/arity artifacts show repeatable exact selected spans on ordinary held-out corpora while random and binary controls stay null.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps while the long-span bundle gate and search frontier remain closed.

work_board.promotion_trigger: Candidate-lattice telemetry improves selected bytes on non-planted held-out rows without requiring recursive superposition or decoder state.
work_board.stop_rule: Disallow recursive superposition; recursive passes operate only on already selected layer outputs.

work_board.promotion_trigger: A real kernel-backed matcher passes CPU/GPU parity on promoted workloads and improves wall-clock or energy enough to change the scale gate.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not trust GPU output or market acceleration while the GPU feature is research-only CPU semantics.

work_board.promotion_trigger: At least three ordinary whole-stream negative groups with zero comparable control wins and exact reconstruction from charged sidecar bytes.
work_board.stop_rule: Do not count residual proximity as compression unless full-stream charged records are negative and controls stay null.
